title: pouteria costata var. vitiensis
intro: Pouteria costata var. vitiensis, also known as the Pacific Pouteria, is a plant species native to the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Sapotaceae and is a variety of Pouteria costata. The Pacific Pouteria is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. It is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine in some Pacific Island cultures.
